rules: SCOPE: Only operate within the ca_healthy_beverage_research/ directory. Do not access, read, or reference any path outside the current project directory.
ENV: Never read or write .env under any circumstance. Use .env.example only to understand what keys are required.
RAW DATA: Never write to data/raw/. These files are created exclusively by scraper scripts at runtime.
PROTECTED FILE: Never overwrite data/output/top10_validated.csv. This is the manually reviewed final output.
NO DELETION: Never delete any file. If a file should be removed, suggest it to the user and wait for them to act.
NO DOWNLOADS: Never download files, packages, or repositories to the project directory or local machine. This includes curl, wget, git clone, pip download, or any equivalent.
NO EXTERNAL ACCESS: Do not access paths outside beverage_intel/. Do not navigate to parent directories.
ASK BEFORE EDITING: Before editing any existing file, state the file path, the proposed change, and the reason. Wait for explicit user approval before writing.
NEW LIBRARIES: Before importing or installing any library not already in requirements.txt, state the library name, why it is needed, and what it replaces or enables. Wait for explicit user approval.
SECRETS: All API credentials must be loaded via os.getenv(). Never hardcode credentials in any file.
RESTRICTED FOLDER: Never read from or write to project_information/ for any reason.
